login.subtitle: Sign in to your school workspace.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your registered email below. We'll send you a One-Time Password (OTP) to reset your account.

reset.title: Security Reset
reset.otpSent: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below.
reset.newPasswordPrompt: Secure your account by creating a new password.
reset.successAlert: Password reset successfully! Please login with your new password.

invite.acceptedMessage: Sign in with your email and password.
invite.invalidInviteMessage: Invite token is missing from the URL.
invite.title: Accept staff invite
invite.subtitle: Create your account to join the school.

unauthorized.title: Access denied
unauthorized.message: Your current role does not include permission for this page.
